title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 492.550 - May be sent by mail or otherwise, when
text:
492.550.  May be sent by mail or otherwise, when. — If the officer taking such depositions reside at such distance from the recorder's office where such depositions properly belong as to prevent an immediate delivery thereof, then it shall be lawful to send the same by mail or other safe conveyance.
(RSMo 1939 § 1966) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1802; 1919 § 5489; 1909 § 6432
